home.title: Available invitations and routes
home.subtitle: Choose an invitation or review the active project templates.
home.singleInvitationDescription: Single-screen version with key event details and RSVP action.
home.multiTemplateDescription: Base preview for screen navigation with transitions.

invitation.title: You are invited
invitation.subtitle: to celebrate with us
invitation.message: We would love to have you join us on this very special day.

fairyTaleWedding.title: My fairy tale wedding
fairyTaleWedding.subtitle: We invite you to live this story with us
fairyTaleWedding.farewellMessage: With love, we hope to see you soon

birthdayInvitation.title: Genesis's Birthday!
birthdayInvitation.subtitle: A magical Totoro-inspired afternoon
birthdayInvitation.introMessage: Join us to celebrate Genesis turning 3 with games, laughter, and cozy forest vibes.
birthdayInvitation.celebrationMessage: There will be cake, music, and a charming woodland setup for everyone to enjoy.
birthdayInvitation.farewellMessage: Bring your brightest smile and your party spirit — we can't wait to celebrate together!

christmasInvitation.title: Merry Christmas
christmasInvitation.subtitle: We invite you to celebrate
christmasInvitation.welcomeMessage: Welcome to the most magical time of the year. Let us celebrate Christmas together.
christmasInvitation.farewellMessage: See you soon and happy holidays! May the magic of Christmas be with you.
